---
id: get-all-stored-entry-ids
title: "List representative entry IDs for every stored row"
description: "Returns one entry ID per stored row matching the optional `search` filter — the same row identities that the paged endpoint exposes, but flattened to a single long list for client-side `Select all` flows. Virtual rows are not included (they have no entry IDs)."
sidebar_label: "List representative entry IDs for every stored row"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List representative entry IDs for every stored row"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v2/organizations/{organizationId}/translation-memories/{translationMemoryId}/entries/entryIds"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns one entry ID per stored row matching the optional `search` filter — the same row identities that the paged endpoint exposes, but flattened to a single long list for client-side `Select all` flows. Virtual rows are not included (they have no entry IDs).

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./get-all-stored-entry-ids.ParamsDetails.json")}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./get-all-stored-entry-ids.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

>
  
</StatusCodes>
